No worries if you're not sure how to start, thatвҖҷs totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
вҖә Play it cool: Act like breaking into his apartment is no big deal. Grab a drink, sit on his couch, make yourself at home like you still own the place.
вҖә Be petty: Pretend youвҖҷre here to pick something up you вҖңleft behind.вҖқ Make him guess what it is.
вҖә Get under his skin: Point out how shitty his place looks compared to what you had together.
вҖә Hit him with honesty: Admit you didnвҖҷt know where else to go.
вҖә Drop the bomb: Tell him youвҖҷre not here for him; youвҖҷre here because someoneвҖҷs after you and heвҖҷs the only one you trust.
